subcodes.title: Epistle to Muhammad Shah 1
subcodes.first_line: Read the Book of the Remembrance of thy Lord, no God is there except Him, the Exalted, the Mighty. Such is indeed a Book about which there is no doubt
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اقرء کتاب ذکر اسم ربک الذی لا اله الا هو العلی الکبیر و انه لکتاب لا ریب فیه قد نزل من لدن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
